title: we can't be friends (wait for your love)
why_this_song: we can't be friends (wait for your love) by Ariana Grande (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: my love, i'll wait for your love
i don't like how you paint me, yet i'm still here hanging
my love, i'll wait for your love
me and my truth, we sit in silence
mmm, baby girl, it's just me and you
'cause i don't wanna argue, but i don't wanna bite

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "wait" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: i didn't think you'd understand me
so for now, it's only me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: how could you ever even try?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "we can't be friends (wait for your love)" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "we can't be friends (wait for your love)" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "we can't be friends (wait for your love)" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "we can't be friends (wait for your love)", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "we can't be friends (wait for your love)" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "we can't be friends (wait for your love)" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?
